question: What is the main difficulty in interpreting the sales trend between 1960 and 1970 in this chart?

options.A: The line and axis labels are too small to clearly see how sales changed from year to year in that period.
options.B: Sales clearly declined every single year between 1960 and 1970.
options.C: Sales clearly increased sharply every single year between 1960 and 1970.
options.D: There were no fluctuations at all in sales between 1960 and 1970.

explanation: Sales were roughly flat from 1960 to 1970, with rises before and after. Small font sizes can make it easy to misread the flat segment as a decline.
